data.title: Cashmere Crew Knit
data.description: The perfect everyday knit in Grade-A Mongolian cashmere. A relaxed crew neck with ribbed cuffs and hem, this piece is impossibly soft against the skin. The slightly boxy fit sits beautifully tucked or untucked. A wardrobe essential you will reach for season after season. Get it now!

images.alt: Oatmeal cashmere crew knit folded on neutral background
Close-up of cashmere knit texture showing soft ribbed detail
Model wearing relaxed cashmere crew knit in natural light
